panels.title: Total RVs
panels.description: Total number of ReplicatedVolumes in the cluster.

panels.title: Unhealthy RVs (Active)
panels.description: Active RVs older than 5 min with IOReady=False. RVs already deleting are excluded from this count.

targets.expr: count((((sds_rv_condition{type="IOReady",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 0) and on(name, storage_class) (sds_rv_present{storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) and on(name) (time() - sds_rv_created_timestamp_seconds{storage_class=~"$storage_class"} > 300)) unless on(name, storage_class) (sds_rv_deleting{storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Degraded RVRs (Active)
panels.description: Active RVRs not in Healthy phase. RVRs already deleting are excluded from this count.

targets.expr: count((((sds_rvr_phase_info{phase!="Healthy",phase!="",node=~"$node"} == 1) and on(name, rv, node) (sds_rvr_present{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) unless on(name, rv, node) (sds_rvr_deleting{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1))) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Deleting RVs
panels.description: Current number of RVs with DeletionTimestamp set. Separate from unhealthy RVs to avoid mixing cleanup with degraded state.

targets.expr: count((sds_rv_deleting{storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1) and on(name, storage_class) (sds_rv_present{storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Deleting RVRs
panels.description: Current number of RVRs with DeletionTimestamp set. Separate from degraded RVRs to avoid mixing cleanup with degraded state.

targets.expr: count((sds_rvr_deleting{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1) and on(name, rv, node) (sds_rvr_present{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Active Datamesh Transitions
panels.description: Current number of active datamesh transitions at the instant query time.

panels.title: Per-Node Resource Count
panels.description: Current number of RVRs and RVAs per node. Empty rows mean no objects matched the current filters.

panels.title: Slowest RVR by RV in Range
panels.description: Top-15 RVs by their slowest RVR completion in the selected range. One row per RV, with the concrete slowest RVR for investigation.

targets.expr: topk(15, (sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000))) == on(rv) group_left max by (rv) (sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000))))

panels.title: RVR Ready Duration P50/P90/P99
panels.description: Time from RVR creation to first Healthy phase, aggregated over events in the selected range. Empty graph means no RVR completions in the selected range.

panels.title: RVR Phase Duration by Phase
panels.description: P90 duration spent in each RVR phase, aggregated from phase transitions observed in the selected range. Empty graph means no phase transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: RVR Ready Events in Range
panels.description: Number of RVRs that first reached Healthy in the selected range. 0 means no completion events in range.

panels.title: Mean RVR Ready Duration in Range
panels.description: Mean time for RVRs to first reach Healthy in the selected range. 0 means no completion events in range.

panels.title: Degraded Phase Frequency
panels.description: Rate of RVR transitions into Degraded phase in the selected range. Empty graph means no degraded transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: Top-15 Slowest RVRs in Range
panels.description: Top-N raw offenders: the 15 slowest individual RVR completions in the selected range. Use RV and node filters to drill down further.

targets.expr: topk(15, sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000)))

panels.title: RVA Attach Events in Range
panels.description: Number of RVA attachments completed in the selected range. 0 means no attach events in range.

panels.title: Mean RVA Attach Duration in Range
panels.description: Mean time from RVA creation to Attached in the selected range. 0 means no attach events in range.

panels.title: RVA Attach Duration P50/P90
panels.description: Time from RVA creation to Attached phase for events in the selected range. Empty graph means no RVA attachments in the selected range.

panels.title: Attached RVAs per Node
panels.description: Number of RVAs in Attached phase per node over time.

panels.title: DRBDR Configure Events
panels.description: Number of DRBD resource configuration completions in the selected range. 0 means no configuration events in range.

panels.title: Mean DRBDR Configure Duration
panels.description: Mean DRBD resource configuration duration in the selected range. 0 means no configuration events in range.

panels.title: DRBDR Deletion Events
panels.description: Number of DRBD resource deletions completed in the selected range. 0 means no deletion events in range.

panels.title: Mean DRBDR Deletion Duration
panels.description: Mean DRBD resource deletion duration in the selected range. 0 means no deletion events in range.

panels.title: DRBD Resource Configuration Time (P90)
panels.description: P90 DRBD resource configuration time for completion events in the selected range. Empty graph means no DRBDR configuration events in the selected range.

panels.title: DRBD Resource Deletion Time (P90)
panels.description: P90 DRBD resource deletion time for completion events in the selected range. Empty graph means no DRBDR deletion events in the selected range.

panels.title: Datamesh Transition Events
panels.description: Number of completed datamesh transitions in the selected range. 0 means no transition completions in range.

panels.title: Mean Transition Duration
panels.description: Mean completed datamesh transition duration in the selected range. 0 means no transition completions in range.

panels.title: Datamesh Step Events
panels.description: Number of completed datamesh steps in the selected range. 0 means no completed steps in range.

panels.title: Mean Step Duration
panels.description: Mean completed datamesh step duration in the selected range. 0 means no completed steps in range.

panels.title: Transition Events by Type (History)
panels.description: Completed datamesh transitions per interval by type. Empty graph means no completed transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: Active Transitions by Type (Current)
panels.description: Current number of active datamesh transitions by type. Use the table below to see which RVs have been active the longest.

panels.title: Transition Duration P90 by Type
panels.description: P90 duration of completed datamesh transitions by type. Read together with transition events and active transitions: empty graph means no completed transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: Step Events by Type/Step (History)
panels.description: Completed datamesh steps per interval by transition type and step. Empty graph means no completed steps in the selected range.

panels.title: RV Deletion Events
panels.description: Number of RV deletions completed in the selected range. 0 means no deletion events in range.

panels.title: Mean RV Deletion Duration
panels.description: Mean RV deletion duration in the selected range. 0 means no deletion events in range.

panels.title: RVR Deletion Events
panels.description: Number of RVR deletions completed in the selected range. 0 means no deletion events in range.

panels.title: Mean RVR Deletion Duration
panels.description: Mean RVR deletion duration in the selected range. 0 means no deletion events in range.

panels.title: RVA Detach Events
panels.description: Number of RVA detach operations completed in the selected range. 0 means no detach events in range.

panels.title: Mean RVA Detach Duration
panels.description: Mean RVA detach duration in the selected range. 0 means no detach events in range.

panels.title: RV vs RVR Deletion Events (History)
panels.description: Completed RV and RVR deletions per interval. Compare the two lines to see whether parent and child cleanup waves move together.

panels.title: RV Deletion Duration P90
panels.description: P90 RV deletion duration for completions in the selected range. Read together with RV deletion event history: empty graph means no RV deletions completed in the selected range.

panels.title: RVR Deletion Duration P90
panels.description: P90 RVR deletion duration for completions in the selected range. Cluster-wide view for direct comparison with RV deletion duration.

panels.title: Current DRBD Unhealthy Connections by Node
panels.description: Current number of DRBD connections in non-healthy states per node. Use the table for state and resource-level detail.

panels.title: DRBD Unhealthy Connections
panels.description: Current DRBD connections not in Connected or UpToDate state. Empty table means all observed connections are healthy.

panels.title: Out of Sync Bytes
panels.description: Total out-of-sync bytes per node across all DRBD devices. Non-zero values indicate replication lag.

panels.title: RV Conditions
panels.description: IOReady/Quorum conditions are not yet populated by the controller.

panels.title: RVR Phase Distribution by Node (Active)
panels.description: Current count of non-deleting RVRs in each phase per node. Deleting RVRs are excluded and counted separately in the overview.

targets.expr: count by (node, phase) ((((sds_rvr_phase_info{node=~"$node"} == 1) and on(name, rv, node) (sds_rvr_present{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) unless on(name, rv, node) (sds_rvr_deleting{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)))

panels.title: Problems: Stuck RVRs (Active)
panels.description: Top-10 active RVRs stuck in a non-Healthy phase longer than 5 minutes. Deleting RVRs are excluded.

targets.expr: topk(10, ((((sds:rvr_stuck_phase_duration:seconds{phase!="Healthy",node=~"$node"}) and on(name, rv, node) (sds_rvr_present{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) unless on(name, rv, node) (sds_rvr_deleting{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} == 1)) > 300))

panels.title: Top Active RV Transitions
panels.description: Oldest currently active datamesh transitions. Use this table to see which RV and transition type have been active the longest.

panels.title: Oldest Deleting RVs
panels.description: Current RVs that have been deleting the longest. Helps distinguish slow cleanup from lack of delete activity.

panels.title: Oldest Deleting RVRs
panels.description: Current RVRs that have been deleting the longest. Use together with RV/RVR deletion history to find slow child cleanup.
